body:
## Summary
- Add `--focus-streak-rules` to `scripts/validate-content.js` so streak parity tests can run the focused validator path.
- Expand streak validation coverage for malformed answer days, invalid `today`, and non-array answer history, updating the expected rule count to 13.
- Add routing parity coverage that prevents the streak rules test from falling back to full content validation.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-streak-rules`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-streak-rules-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js scripts/learning.test.js --test-name-pattern "streak|focus-streak|calculateStreak|getLocalDateKey|timestamp|date-key|malformed|Invalid time value|NaN"`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-streak-rules-parity.test.js lib/learning/streaks.ts && git diff --check -- scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
title: [codex] focus streak rules validation
